sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n62011" key="lasio/pous" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λᾰσῐόπους</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">πουν</itype>, gen. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ποδος</itype>, <sense id="n62011.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">shaggy-footed</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0096.tlg002:238" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aesop.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">238</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
